creator: taguchi@tohoku.iij.ad.jp
text:
Sorry for my too late work...
Here is a update patch for XFree86-4-*.

#1. Support Freetype2
    Now -libaries depend on print/freetype2 ;-)
#2. fix many probrems.
#3. resolv tmpnam() probrem.
    use mktemp() rather than tmpnam().
#4. DRI/Joystick supports are still undergoing.
    compilation errors are removed. But I think we
    need more works...
#5. enhancements for configure flameworks.

Fix: please apply following patch as
   % cd /usr/ports
   % patch -p1 < THIS_FILE
and then, remove following files.
./x11/XFree86-4-documents/files/patch-03
./x11/XFree86-4-documents/files/patch-04
